violations.description: FOOD CONTACT SURFACES - CLEAN (2 pts): Microwave interiors and oven interior not properly maintained.
NON FOOD CONTACT SURFACES - CLEAN (1 pts): Drawer interiors noted need cleaning
SINGLE - USE/SINGLE - SERVICE ARTICLES (1 pts): Single service silverware noted being stored in an unprotected location underneath sink drain.

FOOD DISPLAY SERVICE AND TRANSPORT TEMP (5 pts): Waffle batter noted not being held at 41 degrees fahrenheit or below in dispenser. Leftover batter is refrigrated and used again next day. Instructed staff on need to dispose leftover batter
PERSON IN CHARGE (4 pts): The Manager during the course of the inspection did not possess a Certified Manager's Certificate within the appropriate time.
FLOORS WALLS CEILINGS (1 pts): Walls in the kitchen noted need repair.
